title: tabernaemontana tessmannii
intro: Tabernaemontana tessmannii, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is also known as the Tessmann's apple or Tessmann's tabernaemontana. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana tessmannii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
